original_datasets.name: Supplementary data 1 (survey responses and scale totals)
original_datasets.columns: [SMID, Age, Sex, MiniK_01..MiniK_20, HKSS_01..HKSS_22, DSM5_01..DSM5_23, MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total, DSM5_Total, AAQ_Angry, Attach_Total, Aggresion_Total, Stepparent]

summary_statistics.info: 138 rows x 231 columns. dtypes: float64=35, int64=110, str=86.

original_datasets.notes: Dataset includes precomputed totals used in analysis (MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total, DSM5_Total). Age available for partial correlation control.

tasks.task_instruction: Conduct the analysis without any restrictions.

analysis_path.path_description: Recalculate or use total scores for Mini-K, HKSS, and DSM5, then compute partial correlations between life history strategy and psychopathology controlling for age.
preprocessing_steps: Use existing total scores (MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total, DSM5_Total) or compute sums from items if necessary.
Drop rows with missing values in MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total, DSM5_Total, or Age.

key_choices.missing_data_rule: Listwise deletion for variables used in each test.
key_choices.data_processing: If required, sum questionnaire items to create MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total, and DSM5_Total; otherwise, use provided totals.
key_choices.inference_rule: p-value from partial correlation coefficient; specific threshold not stated.

outcome.name: DSM5_Total
outcome.definition: Total psychopathology score (sum of DSM-5 Level 1 Cross-Cutting items).

main_predictor.name: MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total
main_predictor.definition: Life history strategy total scores; higher values indicate slower strategy.

analysis_code.notes: Reads /app/data/1-s2.0-S1090513816301118-mmc1.csv, computes partial correlations of DSM5_Total with MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total controlling for Age, and writes results to /app/data/results_task1.json.

tasks.notes_for_agent: Follow this planned path; do not change the focal claim, dataset, or analysis goal.

tasks.task_instruction: Use Mini-K for life history strategy; compare groups based on MiniK_Total.

analysis_path.path_description: Group participants by MiniK_Total (fast <= -1; slow >= 1; exclude -1 < score < 1). Test DSM5_Total differences using nonparametric Mann-Whitney U after checking assumptions.
preprocessing_steps: Create binary group: fast (MiniK_Total <= -1) vs slow (MiniK_Total >= 1); exclude two cases with -1 < MiniK_Total < 1.
Drop rows with missing DSM5_Total within groups.
Compute Levene's test, Shapiro-Wilk tests by group, then Mann-Whitney U.

key_choices.main_predictor_measure: MiniK_Total grouped: fast (<= -1) vs slow (>= 1); exclude ambiguous scores between -1 and 1.
key_choices.data_processing: Construct binary group from MiniK_Total thresholds.
key_choices.model_choice: Mann-Whitney U-test (with Levene and Shapiro-Wilk checks).

main_predictor.name: MiniK_group
main_predictor.definition: Binary group based on MiniK_Total: fast <= -1 vs slow >= 1; exclude in-between.

analysis_code.notes: Reads /app/data/1-s2.0-S1090513816301118-mmc1.csv, creates MiniK groups, runs Levene, Shapiro-Wilk, Mann-Whitney U, and writes results to /app/data/results_task2.json.

tasks.notes_for_agent: Use the Mini-K grouping thresholds and nonparametric test as described; do not change the model or thresholds.

files.data/task1__py.py: Python script implementing Task1 partial correlations of DSM5_Total with MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total controlling for Age. Outputs JSON results.
files.data/task2__py.py: Python script implementing Task2 MiniK-based grouping and Mann-Whitney U test on DSM5_Total, including Levene and Shapiro-Wilk checks. Outputs JSON results.

codebase.notes: Scripts assume the dataset is available at /app/data/1-s2.0-S1090513816301118-mmc1.csv and write results to /app/data. These are Python rewrites of the JASP analyses described in the proposed analysis.

analysis.instructions: Execute Task1 and Task2 using the original dataset and Python rewrites. Generate structured JSON outputs for each task.
not_allowed_actions: replace the planned path with a different analysis path

debugging_rule.repair_scope: fix dependency, file path, or output extraction issues only; do not redesign the analysis.

analysis.comparison_metrics: Task1: partial correlation coefficients (r), t, df, p-values for MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total with DSM5_Total controlling for Age; descriptives for totals. Task2: group Ns, medians, Levene F and p, Shapiro-Wilk W and p by group, Mann-Whitney U and p; binary grouping rule and exclusions.
